pairs.question: What was the name of the sponsor for the 2022 Western Premier League season?
pairs.answer: The sponsor for the 2022 Western Premier League season was Burmac.

pairs.question: Why was no title awarded in the 2021 Western Premier League season?
pairs.answer: No title was awarded in 2021 because the competition was abandoned one round before the finals due to the COVID-19 pandemic.

pairs.question: Which two teams joined the Western Premier League in 2022, and when did they previously compete in the league?
pairs.answer: In 2022, Bathurst 75 and Orange CYMS joined the league. Bathurst 75 last competed in the 2008 season, and Orange CYMS last competed in the 2002 season.

pairs.question: When did Bathurst 75 first announce its intention to field a team for the 2022 Western Premier League season?
pairs.answer: Bathurst 75 announced its intention to field a team for the 2022 season in November 2021.

pairs.question: What was the outcome of the 2022 Western Premier League grand final?
pairs.answer: The 2022 Western Premier League grand final was won by Orange Waratahs, who defeated Bathurst club Panorama 2–1.

pairs.question: Who were the top goal scorers of the 2022 Western Premier League regular season, and how many goals did they score?
pairs.answer: Craig Sugden of Orange Waratahs and Agieg Aluk of Bathurst 75 were the top goal scorers, each finishing the regular season with 16 goals.

pairs.question: How many teams participated in the 2022 Western Premier League season?
pairs.answer: The 2022 Western Premier League season featured 11 teams.
